citation_and_locator: Lam, Charles. 2014. A Unified Analysis to Surpass Comparative and Experiential Aspect. PACLIC 28:368-377. ACL Anthology Y14-1043; pp.368-371 and 375-376, examples 2-3 and 30-32
what_it_supports: Directly contrasts property-predicate + 過 + standard surpass comparison with event-predicate + 過 experiential aspect; identifies the following NP as the comparison standard and notes optional differential measure material.
limit: One formal analysis does not establish unrestricted predicate, standard, measure, polarity, question, register, or regional productivity.

citation_and_locator: Yiu, Yuk Man Carine. 2024. The multifunctionality of gwo3 in Cantonese: Grammaticalization and typology. In Studies in Vietnamese Historical Linguistics: Southeast and East Asian Contexts, pp.123-172. DOI 10.1007/978-981-97-4314-8_8; HKUST research portal abstract

limit: Abstract-level access does not provide exact examples or current licensing diagnostics for each function.
